parts.text: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts uses RefreshQueue with a per-tenant key so duplicate refresh requests for the same tenant coalesce into one refresh while unrelated tenants can continue in parallel.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e529b577ffedi6LW4J53I5ylV","blob_id":"auth_queue","message_id":"msg_e1ad64a98001sSje1Hl9NnhnIt"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A single global mutex was rejected because auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel showed different tenants must not block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["billing retry queue global mutex rationale","markdown parser cache/onboarding context","FLAG_AUTH_QUEUE_ROLLBACK"]}
